label: intyx.ai
description: Upload CSV, JSON, or connect an API. Get AI-generated charts, executive summaries, and smart recommendations in seconds.

label: dynamic.intyx.ai
tagline: AI agents that control your UI.
description: Documentation and playground for the dynamic_intyx Flutter package. MCP protocol bridge between AI agents and your widget tree.

label: dynamic_intyx
description: Let AI agents render and orchestrate your Flutter widget tree via the MCP protocol — no hardcoded logic required.

label: intyx_sdk

description: First-class Flutter SDK for the intyx platform. Upload data, fetch AI insights, and render beautiful charts from mobile.

label: intyx for iOS

label: intyx for Android
description: Native Android experience for the intyx platform. Full AI data analysis and visualization in your pocket.
